ats_utilities.splasher.splash_property module¶

Module

splash_property.py

Info

Defines class SplashProperty with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for checking splash screen property.

class ats_utilities.splasher.splash_property.SplashProperty(context_bundle: ContextBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: ISplashProperty

Defines class SplashProperty with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for checking splash screen property.

It defines:

attributes:
_EXPECTED_PROP_KEYS - Expected property names.
__checker - Factoriezed parameters checker (default Checker).
__reporter - Factoriezed reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
__verbose - Factoriezed Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
__splash_property - Splash screen property in dict format (default None).
methods:
__init__ - Initials SplashProperty constructor.
splash_property - Property method for get/set splash property.
validates - Validates splash screen property.
_reporter - Property method for getting the internal reporter instance.
__str__ - Returns the string representation of SplashProperty.
_EXPECTED_PROP_KEYS: List[str] = ['ats_organization', 'ats_repository', 'ats_name', 'ats_logo_path', 'ats_use_github_infrastructure']¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
property _reporter: IReporter¶

Property method for getting the internal reporter instance.

Returns:

The reporter instance in IReporter format.

Return type:

<IReporter>

Exceptions:

None

property splash_property: Dict[Any, Any] | None¶

Property method for getting splash screen property.

Returns:

Formatted splash screen property in dict format | None.

Return type:

<Optional[Dict[Any, Any]]>

Exceptions:

RuntimeError, AttributeError

validates() → bool[source]¶

Validates splash screen property.

Returns:

True (success) else False (fail).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

RuntimeError, AttributeError
